release_notes: Fixed StackOverflow issue during DEX to native conversion
UI refinements and better layout consistency
Added local save option for outputs
Reduced UI lag during heavy operations
Minor bug fixes and internal improvements

launch_sheet.title: 🎉 Welcome to Dex2C Tool!
launch_sheet.message: Thank you for using Dex2C Tool. Join our Telegram channel for the latest updates and support.

announcement.title: Scheduled Maintenance
announcement.message: We will be performing maintenance on March 25th. Some features may be unavailable.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.message: We're performing scheduled maintenance. The app will be back shortly. Thank you for your patience.

kill_switch.message: This version is no longer supported. Please update to continue using the app.

rate_limit.cooldown_message: You've reached your daily limit. Try again tomorrow.

blocked_devices.message: This device has been blocked from using the app.

changes: Fixed StackOverflow issue during DEX to native conversion
UI refinements and better layout consistency
Added local save option for outputs
Reduced UI lag during heavy operations
Minor bug fixes and internal improvements
Kill switch, rate limiting, device blocking

items: Enable 'Obfuscate strings' to encrypt string literals in native code
Turn on 'Dynamic register' for JNI dynamic registration
Skip synthetic methods to reduce output size
Join our Telegram for tips and support!

feedback.title: Enjoying Dex2C Tool?
feedback.message: You've protected multiple APKs! Let us know how we're doing.

survey.title: Quick Survey
survey.message: Help us improve Dex2C Tool! Takes 30 seconds.
